author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Sasaki to Pii-chan Season 2' Reveals New Staff, Teaser Promo for Fall 2026
The official website of the Sasaki to Pii-chan Season 2 (Sasaki and Peeps Season 2) television anime revealed the new staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video on Monday. The anime series adapting Buncololi's comedy fantasy light novel is scheduled to premiere in October 2026. Staff Director: Yuushi Ibe (Tearmoon Teikoku Monogatari) NEW Assistant Director: Yamato Oouchi (Soredemo Ayumu wa Yosetekuru episode director) NEW Series Composition: Deko Akao (Buta no Liver wa...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Tsukumizu to Launch 'Shoujo Shuumatsu Ryokou' Prequel Manga in June 2026
Shinchosha's Kurage Bunch web magazine announced on Saturday that Tsukumizu will begin drawing a prequel to their Shoujo Shuumatsu Ryokou (Girls' Last Tour) manga titled Kaisou Toshi Tanpenshuu (Collected Fragments of a Layered City) on June 26. Tsukumizu serialized the original slice of life adventure manga on the Kurage Bunch web magazine from February 2014 to January 2018. Shinchosha published the sixth and final volume in March 2018. Yen Press licensed the manga in English in 2016...
